ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Mailing address of the customer */,
  "zipcode" TEXT /* Zipcode of the customer's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer's address */,
  "stateAbbr" TEXT /* State abbreviation of the customer's address */,
  "avatar" TEXT /* Avatar URL for the customer's profile */,
  "birthday" TEXT /* Birthday of the customer */,
  "first_seen" TEXT /* Date the customer was first seen on the platform */,
  "last_seen" TEXT /* Date the customer was last seen on the platform */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the customer */,
  "income_bracket" TEXT /* Income bracket of the customer */,
  "referral_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who referred this customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Discount code applied to the order */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Shipping cost for the order */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the order */,
  "sub_total" REAL /* Sub-total amount before tax and shipping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product being ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price per unit of the product at the time of order */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the item */,
  "item_total" REAL /* Total cost of the item including discounts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Current price of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the group was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_groups" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer-group relationship */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer was added to the group */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer's group membership was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_groups_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_groups_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "newsletters" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each newsletter subscription */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "subscription_date" TEXT /* Date the customer subscribed to the newsletter */,
  "subscription_status" TEXT /* Current subscription status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_newsletters_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commands" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each command */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "command_date" TEXT /* Date the command was made */,
  "command" TEXT /* Type of command (e.g., order, login) */,
  "command_type" TEXT /* Type of command (e.g., order, login, logout) */,
  "command_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the command */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commands_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the sale was made */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "sale_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the sale was made (e.g., online, in-store) */,
  "sale_location" TEXT /* Location of the sale (e.g., store ID) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date the product was last reordered */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping (e.g., standard, express) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the order was returned */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "return_method" TEXT /* Method of return (e.g., mail, in-store) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text */,
  "verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Whether the review is from a verified purchase */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the review was marked as helpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("id")
)
